summary.lv: QA inženieris Evolution Latvia Scrum komandā, veicot manuālo un automatizēto testēšanu straujas izstrādes vidē ar 2+ gadu pieredzi.
summary.en: QA Engineer at Evolution Latvia, performing manual and automated testing within a Scrum/Kanban development team in a fast-paced live gaming environment. Requires 2+ years of software testing experience.
